overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage following a large bird of prey in third-person perspective as it soars over a scenic landscape. The bird flies over rolling hills, a winding river, and ancient stone ruins during golden hour with warm sunlight illuminating the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of grassland with historic stone ruins

agents.ego_description: large bird flying steadily forward with wings fully spread, maintaining altitude over the terrain

entered.detail: ancient stone ruin with cylindrical tower structure visible directly below the flight path
wide river winding through the valley reflecting the golden hour sunlight
gentle grassy hills with scattered vegetation extending to the horizon
hazy mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon beneath the clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady aerial view following a large bird flying over a scenic landscape. Below, an ancient stone tower stands prominently amidst rolling grasslands, while a winding river flows through the valley to the left. The golden hour sun casts long shadows across the terrain as the bird maintains a smooth, forward trajectory.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of open grassland during maneuver

events.description: bird banks sharply to the left, tilting wings to change direction while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: bird executes a pronounced left bank, angling wings to navigate over the terrain before leveling out

entered.detail: densely vegetated hillside with dark green trees covering the slope
cluster of large boulders and rock formations emerging from the grassland

segments.scene_description: The bird initiates a sharp left bank around the 20-second mark, tilting its wings to alter course over the grassland. The stone tower passes behind and out of view as new terrain featuring forested slopes and rocky outcrops comes into view. The river remains visible on the left but recedes into the distance as the bird completes its turn and resumes steady flight.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of rolling plains and distant settlement

agents.ego_description: bird resumes steady forward flight, gliding over open plains with occasional wing adjustments

entered.detail: small cluster of buildings or structures visible on the distant horizon
isolated large rocks dotting the grassy terrain below

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the bird maintains steady flight over expansive open plains. The terrain features scattered boulders and gentle undulations, with a distant settlement visible on the right horizon. The mountains ahead grow slightly larger as the bird continues its journey, with the river still visible far to the left reflecting the warm sunset light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial trajectory that begins over ancient ruins and shifts toward an expansive open plain under the glow of a setting sun. It begins with a steady glide over rolling grasslands, where an ancient stone tower stands prominently beside a winding river. As the bird initiates a sharp left bank, the tower recedes from view and the landscape transforms into a series of forested slopes and rocky outcrops. The scene then opens up into vast, undulating plains scattered with boulders, while the river drifts further into the distance to the left. Finally, the camera maintains a steady forward path toward growing mountains on the horizon, passing a distant settlement bathed in warm sunset light.
